name: YouTube Search
description: Search YouTube and extract results. Supports the videos, playlists, channels, live, and movies filter pills. Returns up to `limit` items with the canonical id, title, channel, duration, views, and age.

help.summary: Run a YouTube search and return the top `limit` results for the chosen filter.

parameters.name: search_query
parameters.description: Query text. Same string you would type into the YouTube search box.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.shape: enum: videos | playlists | channels | live | movies
parameters.description: Which YouTube search filter to apply. Defaults to videos. Maps to YouTube's `sp` URL parameter; the extractor scopes to the matching renderer type so the output shape stays consistent within each filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20.

examples.command: rzn-browser run youtube search --param search_query="rust programming tutorial"
rzn-browser run youtube search --param search_query="machine learning course" --param filter=playlists --param limit=5
rzn-browser run youtube search --param search_query="fireship" --param filter=channels --param limit=10

help.returns: Object with { query, filter, url, returned_count, results[] }. For videos/live/movies each result is { video_id, title, channel, channel_url, url, duration, views, published, description }. For playlists: { playlist_id, title, channel, url, video_count }. For channels: { channel_id, handle, title, url, subscribers, description }.
notes: Uses YouTube's built-in filter pills via the sp URL code. The codes have been stable for years but could rot — if a filter suddenly returns zero results, confirm the sp code is still accepted.

Shorts, shelves, ads, and horizontal carousels are skipped so the output stays clean. To get Shorts specifically, request the live/movies filter or fall back to filter=videos; dedicated shorts support is not implemented.
`published` and `views` are the human-readable strings YouTube renders (e.g. '2.3m views', '4 years ago'). Parse downstream if you need numeric values.
Requires a standard browser session. No sign-in required.

browser_automation.description: Dedicated-tab YouTube search. Navigates to the homepage to seed cookies, redirects to /results with the chosen sp filter, then extracts results.

sequences.name: youtube_search
sequences.description: Open YouTube -> redirect to /results with chosen filter -> wait for results -> extract.

optional_variables.name: filter
optional_variables.description: Filter: videos | playlists | channels | live | movies

steps.name: Redirect to /results with filter
steps.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const q=cleanArg(arg0);if(!q)throw new Error('search_query is required');const f=cleanArg(arg1).toLowerCase();const sp={videos:'EgIQAQ%3D%3D',playlists:'EgIQAw%3D%3D',channels:'EgIQAg%3D%3D',live:'EgJAAQ%3D%3D',movies:'EgIQBA%3D%3D'}[f]||'';const params=new URLSearchParams({search_query:q});const target='https://www.youtube.com/results?'+params.toString()+(sp?('&sp='+sp):'');setTimeout(()=>window.location.assign(target),0);return{redirected:true,target,filter:f||'videos'};

steps.name: Wait for at least one result card
steps.selector: ytd-video-renderer, ytd-playlist-renderer, yt-lockup-view-model, ytd-channel-renderer, ytd-movie-renderer, ytd-radio-renderer

steps.name: Extract results
steps.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const q=cleanArg(arg0);const fRaw=cleanArg(arg1).toLowerCase();const filter=['videos','playlists','channels','live','movies'].includes(fRaw)?fRaw:'videos';const n=parseInt(cleanArg(arg2),10);const limit=Number.isFinite(n)&&n>0?Math.min(n,50):20;const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const abs=(h)=>{if(!h)return'';try{return new URL(h,location.origin).toString();}catch{return String(h);}};const vidFromUrl=(u)=>{try{const x=new URL(u,location.origin);return x.pathname==='/watch'?x.searchParams.get('v'):null;}catch{return null;}};const listFromUrl=(u)=>{try{return new URL(u,location.origin).searchParams.get('list');}catch{return null;}};const dedupDur=(s)=>{const t=norm(s);if(!t)return'';const half=t.length/2;if(t.length%2===0&&t.slice(0,half)===t.slice(half))return t.slice(0,half);const parts=t.split(' ');if(parts.length>=2&&parts[0]===parts[1])return parts[0];return parts[0]||t;};const cardSelector=(filter==='playlists'||filter==='channels')?'yt-lockup-view-model, ytd-playlist-renderer, ytd-radio-renderer, ytd-channel-renderer':'ytd-video-renderer, ytd-movie-renderer';let lastCount=0,stall=0;for(let i=0;i<8;i++){const cur=document.querySelectorAll(cardSelector).length;if(cur>=limit)break;window.scrollTo({top:document.body.scrollHeight,behavior:'instant'});await sleep(900);if(cur===lastCount){stall++;if(stall>=2)break;}else{stall=0;}lastCount=cur;}window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'instant'});await sleep(200);const results=[];if(filter==='videos'||filter==='live'||filter==='movies'){const cards=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('ytd-video-renderer, ytd-movie-renderer'));for(const el of cards){if(results.length>=limit)break;const a=el.querySelector('a#video-title, a#thumbnail[href*="/watch"]');const href=a?.getAttribute('href');const url=abs(href);const video_id=vidFromUrl(url);if(!video_id)continue;const title=norm(el.querySelector('#video-title')?.textContent||a?.getAttribute('title')||'');const chA=el.querySelector('ytd-channel-name a, #channel-name a');const channel=norm(chA?.textContent||'');const channel_url=chA?abs(chA.getAttribute('href')):'';const metaSpans=Array.from(el.querySelectorAll('#metadata-line span')).map(s=>norm(s.textContent));const views=metaSpans.find(x=>/view/i.test(x))||metaSpans[0]||'';const published=metaSpans.find(x=>/ago|streamed|scheduled|premiered/i.test(x))||metaSpans[1]||'';const duration=dedupDur(el.querySelector('ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer')?.textContent||'');const description=norm(el.querySelector('.metadata-snippet-text, yt-formatted-string.metadata-snippet-text-navigation')?.textContent||'').slice(0,280);results.push({video_id,title,channel,channel_url,url,duration,views,published,description});}}else if(filter==='playlists'){const cards=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('ytd-playlist-renderer, ytd-radio-renderer, yt-lockup-view-model'));for(const el of cards){if(results.length>=limit)break;const a=el.querySelector('a[href*="list="]');const href=a?.getAttribute('href');const url=abs(href);const playlist_id=listFromUrl(url);if(!playlist_id)continue;const title=norm(el.querySelector('#video-title, .ytLockupMetadataViewModelTitle, h3, a.ytLockupMetadataViewModelTitle')?.textContent||'');const chLink=el.querySelector('a[href*="/@"], a[href*="/channel/"]');const chTxt=chLink?norm(chLink.textContent):'';const channel=chTxt&&chTxt.toLowerCase()!=='course'&&chTxt.toLowerCase()!=='playlist'?chTxt:norm(el.querySelector('ytd-channel-name a')?.textContent||'');const countEl=el.querySelector('yt-thumbnail-badge-view-model, yt-thumbnail-bottom-overlay-view-model, yt-formatted-string.ytd-playlist-renderer');const video_count=norm(countEl?.textContent||'');if(!title)continue;results.push({playlist_id,title,channel,url,video_count});}}else if(filter==='channels'){const cards=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('ytd-channel-renderer'));for(const el of cards){if(results.length>=limit)break;const a=el.querySelector('a[href]');const href=a?.getAttribute('href');const url=abs(href);if(!url||!/\/(@|channel\/|c\/|user\/)/.test(url))continue;const title=norm(el.querySelector('#text, ytd-channel-name #text')?.textContent||el.querySelector('#channel-title')?.textContent||'');const handleEl=el.querySelector('#subscribers, .ytd-channel-renderer #subscribers');let handle=norm(handleEl?.textContent||'');if(!handle.startsWith('@')){const m=url.match(/\/(@[^/?#]+)/);if(m)handle=m[1];}const videoCountTxt=norm(el.querySelector('#video-count')?.textContent||'');const metaTxt=norm(el.querySelector('ytd-video-meta-block, yt-formatted-string.ytd-channel-renderer')?.textContent||'');const subsMatch=(metaTxt+' '+videoCountTxt).match(/([\d.,KMB]+)\s*subscribers?/i);const subscribers=subsMatch?subsMatch[0]:'';const description=norm(el.querySelector('.description')?.textContent||'').slice(0,200);let channel_id=null;const m2=url.match(/\/channel\/([^/?#]+)/);if(m2)channel_id=m2[1];results.push({channel_id,handle,title,url,subscribers,description});}}return{query:q,filter,url:location.href,returned_count:results.length,results};
